title: New Ambient Music
description: This mod replaces Minecraft's regular ambient music with new songs, listeners and cues. Use f6 to see config mode and f7 to toggle between New Music and Minecraft's.
body:
This mod replaces Minecraft's regular ambient music with 25 new songs and 48 sound effects that variate according to biome and entities and have volume controlled by time of day.

Songs and sound effects have cooldowns and random play time to switch up ambience.

Music can be switched back to Mincraft's with a toggle

Enjoy a new music experience with New Ambient Music in you world.

Commands:

Use f6 to see config mode and f7 to toggle between New Music and Minecrafts.



Music:
All music is by mod author and split into sets.
